examples: The mixture will solidify into toffee.
The orange street lamps are crumpled toffee-wrappers glued to lollipop sticks.
Coconut mango tango, toffee mint banana, guava orange crunch, bubblegum humpty dumpty, each has its fans.
The aromatics are divine, oozing spices, dark cherry, toffee and cinnamon, the scents just blaze out of the glass.
